▸ AvP: Automated Vulnerability Patching

NEBULA:FOG 2026  |  ROGUE::AGENT Track

AVP

AvP: Automated Vulnerability Patching

An AI-driven skill that finds vulnerabilities, selects the safest fix, validates it, and ships a PR with evidence — all within a single agent session.

Built by: jkalinaftw · tracertea · redsteve
NEBULA:FOG 2026 | ROGUE::AGENT Track
Title slide with team introduction and project hook.

The Problem

Dependency vulnerabilities are the leading attack vector in modern software supply chains. Security teams drown in scanner noise, triage manually, and fix reactively. The average critical vulnerability takes 60 days to remediate.

  • Scanners produce hundreds of findings per repo. Engineers spend 80% of time triaging, 20% fixing.
  • Manual version selection risks introducing new vulnerabilities or breaking changes.
  • No audit trail connects the finding, the strategy decision, and the fix evidence.
  • Duplicate remediation work across teams: no coordination protocol exists.
Frame the problem with concrete metrics. Innovation angle: AI+Security intersection.

The Architecture

AvP is an AI skill — an AI agent capability invoked from any Claude Code session. Five irreducible workflows replace an entire service stack: no PostgreSQL, no Temporal, no queue workers. The agent IS the orchestrator.

Fetch → Triage → Strategy → Validate → Ship PR
  • Python 3.12+ with uv, Pydantic, httpx, Click CLI — production-grade stack.
  • Multi-scanner support: Snyk API, Wiz exports, generic SARIF/JSON import.
  • Agent IS the orchestrator — no queue workers, no persistent state, no Docker orchestration.
  • Git and GitHub are the coordination layer. Decision logs committed to the repo for audit.
Technical Execution pillar: show architecture quality and complexity reduction.

The Pipeline in Action

# 1. Fetch findings from Snyk
$ uv run vuln-remediation fetch acme-corp proj-123 --severity high,critical

# 2. Check candidate version safety against OSV + GHSA
$ uv run vuln-remediation osv-check pkg:npm/lodash 4.17.21
{"version": "4.17.21", "safe": true, "advisories": []}

# 3. Analyze breaking changes between versions
$ uv run vuln-remediation changelog lodash 4.17.19 4.17.21
{"semver_delta": "patch", "breaking_changes": [], "deprecations": []}

# 4. Check for existing remediation PRs (dedup across teams)
$ uv run vuln-remediation dedup-check acme-corp/api GHSA-29mw

# 5. Generate PR with full evidence chain
$ uv run vuln-remediation render-pr remediation-data.json
  • Every CLI subcommand is independently testable and composable.
  • Strategy engine uses a deterministic decision tree: Update → Patch → Replace → Mitigate.
  • Confidence scoring gates PR creation: ≥0.80 for patch/minor, ≥0.90 for major version updates.
Technical Execution + Demo Quality: show real CLI output and decision logic.

Evidence & Validation

Every remediation produces a complete evidence chain. Nothing is silently skipped — findings either get a PR or a documented skip reason.

7 CLI Commands
6 Workflows
45 Tests Passing
3 Execution Modes
4 Fix Strategies
2 Safety DBs
  • Validation pipeline: build, test, re-scan, lockfile stability — weighted confidence score.
  • PR template includes: findings, strategy rationale, breaking changes, test evidence, reviewer checklist, rollback instructions.
  • Skip summary with categorized reasons: below_severity, no_fix, already_open, duplicate, low_confidence, validation_failed.
Technical Execution: concrete metrics and evidence demonstrate production quality.

Security Innovation

AvP demonstrates a fundamentally new approach to vulnerability management: AI agents that operate within zero-trust security boundaries, making deterministic decisions with human oversight at every critical juncture.

  • Deterministic strategy engine: LLM assists with explanation, not decision. The fix strategy decision tree is code, not prompt.
  • Candidate version safety: Every upgrade target is verified against OSV and GHSA before selection. No blind updates.
  • Execution isolation: Three modes from direct to Docker rootless + network-restricted for untrusted repos.
  • Multi-human coordination: Branch naming conventions and dedup-check prevent duplicate work across teams.
  • Audit trail by design: Decision logs committed to the repo create forensic-grade remediation records.
Innovation pillar: AI+Security intersection. Unique framing of agent security boundaries.

Ship It.

AvP transforms vulnerability remediation from reactive firefighting into systematic, evidence-backed, agent-assisted security engineering. The agent finds what's broken, proves it can be safely fixed, and ships the PR with receipts.

uv run vuln-remediation remediate — from finding to fix in one session.
